message:
feat(agentdb): implement ADR-007 Phase 1 NativeAccelerator capability bridge

Bridges unused @ruvector APIs into AgentDB's pipeline with lazy-loading
and JS fallbacks. Integrates SIMD vector math (ruvllm), WASM witness/
segment verification (rvf-wasm), native InfoNCE+AdamW (attention), tensor
compression (gnn), router persistence, and SONA extended APIs. Wired
into SelfLearningRvfBackend with 68 new tests (121 total, zero regressions).

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
